architectReview.evidence: Architect final review cleared the text edit-session control plane, additive current-document picker metadata, and the final fail-closed restore delta without reopening any live-routing blocker.

executorQa.evidence: Leader-ran focused package verification covered OWN edit-session preview/apply/restore, FastMCP registration/capabilities, current-document picker metadata, mixed-route partial-apply behavior, docs count drift, and Windows artifact scaffold honesty. Critic approval: agent://30-CriticG001Delta.
e2eCommands: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with pyflakes --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_live_regression.py tests/test_maintainability.py tests/test_edit.py tests/test_edit_session.py tests/test_delegate_edit_session.py tests/test_server.py tests/test_capabilities.py tests/test_live_current_document.py tests/test_live_resolve.py -q
redTeamCommands: uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests scripts/windows_live_regression_harness.py
python3 -m json.tool docs/prd.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/windows-live-regression-template.json > /dev/null && python3 scripts/windows_live_regression_harness.py --help

artifactRefs.description: Focused pytest, pyflakes, docs JSON validation, and harness CLI evidence for the continuation checkpoint

contractCoverage.obligation: OWN text replacement must use immutable preview, explicit substrate tagging, single-session apply, and journal/snapshot restore without inventing rich-live undo semantics.
Current-document wrappers must preserve fail-closed routing while exposing additive human-readable picker metadata only.
Windows/Hangul live evidence must stay honest: scaffold future capture artifacts without claiming literal desktop write-safe proof.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: pytest focused package lane + pyflakes + docs json + harness cli help

adversarialCases.scenario: The applied target bytes drift after apply before restore is requested.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: restore_edit_session refuses to overwrite the changed target and raises a fail-closed error.

adversarialCases.scenario: A newly created target is deleted after apply before restore is requested.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: restore_edit_session refuses to silently recreate or ignore the deletion and raises a fail-closed error.

adversarialCases.scenario: Named-field apply succeeds but the cell leg fails during a mixed current-document apply.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The wrapper returns partial_apply_error with explicit named_result/cell_result and invalidates the token.

adversarialCases.scenario: The current active document is a saved .hwp file rather than a saved .hwpx file.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: preview_current_hwp_document stops at preview_requires_hwpx and does not mint a token.

adversarialCases.scenario: The Linux session can validate package behavior and artifact scaffolds but cannot capture literal Windows/Hangul desktop writes.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Docs, PRD, and harness artifacts keep desktop proof pending instead of claiming completion.

iteration.evidence: The prior architect/critic blockers were fixed at source, the focused package lane was rerun cleanly at 76 passed, and the current docs/harness outputs remain honest about pending Windows literal write-safe evidence.
rerunCommands: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with pyflakes --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_live_regression.py tests/test_maintainability.py tests/test_edit.py tests/test_edit_session.py tests/test_delegate_edit_session.py tests/test_server.py tests/test_capabilities.py tests/test_live_current_document.py tests/test_live_resolve.py -q
uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests scripts/windows_live_regression_harness.py
python3 -m json.tool docs/prd.json > /dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/evidence/windows-live-regression-template.json > /dev/null && python3 scripts/windows_live_regression_harness.py --help
